title: illus triandrus
intro: Illus triandrus, also known as the Woodland Garlic or Wild Chives, is a perennial plant in the lily family (Liliaceae) native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Illus triandrus include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Illus triandrus include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting digestive health, among others. Illus triandrus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
